programme.title: 999: What Happened Next
programme.desc: A car is in flames. A thief is fatally stabbed. A 999 call comes in and an investigation begins. But if nothing is what it first seems, can the police bring the guilty to justice?

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A suspicious car linked to multiple thefts crashes into passing traffic, and the cops battle a surge in thefts from lorries - they intercept and box in a couple of known offenders.
A suspicious car linked to multiple thefts crashes into passing traffic.

programme.title: Death By Fame
programme.desc: Singer Christina Grimmie became an international superstar after performing on 'The Voice'. But one fan's obsession would bring her dreams to a tragic end. S1/Ep4

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex...
programme.desc: ...Experiment: Jonny and Sarah fall for lingerie model Marie. Claude and Amy want to form relationships with multiple partners, but can Claude overcome his guilt issues?

programme.title: Chevalier
programme.desc: Exuberant historical costume drama. Kelvin Harrison Jr stars as prodigiously talented French-Caribbean swordsman and composer Joseph Bologne, who literally out-fiddled Mozart.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they extract iron ore from one of the most remote mines on the planet? And how do they make chandeliers that are fit for a queen? S14/Ep7

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Barbara arrives at St George's with a dangerously high heart rate. John woke up and couldn't feel his leg. And Suzy has come to A&E after being badly bitten by her dog.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After the daughter of a Muslim family is killed in a hate crime, Barba is forced to drop charges against a suspect when a witness is deported.
The daughter of a Muslim family is killed in a hate crime.

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Insight at a specialist clinic where a team of top dermatologists treats a range of conditions.
Insight at a clinic where a team of top dermatologists treats a range of conditions.

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: As the longest POW in Vietnam history, Ernie Brace likely endured more than any other POW during the war. Held for almost eight years, he faced capture, starvation, sickness, torture, solitude and desperation.
As the longest POW in Vietnam history, Ernie Brace likely endured more than any other POW.

programme.title: Scotland Tonight
programme.desc: Current affairs show which tackles the issues behind the headlines from a Scottish perspective.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Dust Devils' operation halts and the hold-up could cost them thousands of dollars. A cyclone causes damage to Shane and Russell's wash plant. S5/Ep16

programme.title: Murder On CCTV
programme.desc: 18-year-old Kyle Farishian was working a late-night shift at 7-Eleven when a masked assailant attacked him. Detectives scrutinise surveillance footage for any clues. S6/Ep18

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts an all-star trip in Kansas City, MO, to sample pigskin with coach Andy Reid. And, rocker Sammy Hagar tries a crazy burger and French toast. S31/Ep1

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: The team investigate their largest location in a 33-acre former Napoleonic fortress, home to prison cells and a network of tunnels. S7/Ep7

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan discovers the delights of Cheshire and its surrounding countryside, boating over an aqueduct, visiting the UK's biggest Roman amphitheatre and learning the martial art of Suffrajitsu.
Susan discovers the delights of Cheshire and its surrounding countryside.

programme.title: Manhunt
programme.desc: In this true crime story, Manchester Police get a chilling 999 call. A man's being forced into a car. He vanishes without a trace. Detectives race to find him before it's too late. (Ep1/3)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Mysteries of the World's Oldest Temple: The rock-hewn pillars of Gobeklitepe in Turkey have baffled archaeologists for decades. Who built this incredible monument, and why?

programme.title: Taken 2
programme.desc: Action-packed thriller film sequel starring Liam Neeson and Famke Janssen, 2012. A gang of kidnappers take revenge on Bryan Mills and his wife by holding them hostage in Istanbul.

programme.title: The Wrap With Anna Botting
programme.desc: Debate, analysis and insight on the biggest news stories of the day from the UK and around the world.
